scenarios.title: Verify home page loads successfully and displays all key elements
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video
Wait for page to fully load
Verify page title contains 'SnipForge' or 'AI Video Toolkit'
Check that main navigation menu is visible
Verify hero section with main headline is displayed
Confirm CTA buttons are visible
Verify pricing information is accessible
scenarios.expectedResult: Home page loads within 3 seconds, all key elements (navigation, hero section, CTA buttons, pricing) are visible and properly rendered

scenarios.title: Verify 25 AI video tools are displayed and accessible from home page
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video
Locate the tools/features section on the home page
Count the number of tools displayed or linked
Verify that 25 tools are mentioned or shown
Click on at least 3 different tool links/cards
Verify each click navigates to the respective tool page or opens tool interface
scenarios.expectedResult: All 25 AI video tools are visible or referenced on home page, tools are clickable and navigate to correct destinations

scenarios.title: Verify Free plan details are correctly displayed (3 videos/month, max 5 minutes)
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video
Scroll to the pricing section
Locate the Free plan card/section
Verify '3 videos per month' limit is clearly stated
Verify 'maximum 5 minutes per video' limit is displayed
Check if any other Free plan features or restrictions are listed
Verify there is a sign-up or 'Get Started' button for Free plan
scenarios.expectedResult: Free plan displays '3 videos/month' and '5 minutes max' limitations clearly, along with a sign-up CTA button

scenarios.title: Verify Pro plan details are correctly displayed ($5/month, unlimited videos)
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video
Scroll to the pricing section
Locate the Pro plan card/section
Verify price is displayed as '$5/month' or '$5 per month'
Verify 'unlimited videos' or 'unlimited' feature is clearly stated
Check for any additional Pro plan benefits listed
Verify there is a subscription or 'Upgrade' button for Pro plan
scenarios.expectedResult: Pro plan displays '$5/month' pricing and 'unlimited videos' feature clearly, with an upgrade/subscribe CTA button

scenarios.title: Verify primary CTA buttons functionality and user journey initiation
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video
Identify primary CTA button in hero section (e.g., 'Get Started', 'Try Free', 'Sign Up')
Click on the primary CTA button
Verify redirection to sign-up/registration page or tool selection page
Go back to home page
Locate and click secondary CTA if present (e.g., 'View Tools', 'Learn More')
Verify appropriate navigation occurs
scenarios.expectedResult: Primary CTA redirects users to sign-up or onboarding flow, secondary CTAs navigate to relevant pages, all buttons are functional

scenarios.title: Verify responsive design and mobile compatibility of home page
steps: Open https://snipforge.video in Chrome browser
Open developer tools and toggle device toolbar
Test page in mobile view (375x667 - iPhone SE)
Verify navigation menu adapts to mobile (hamburger menu or similar)
Check that pricing cards stack vertically and remain readable
Verify CTA buttons are easily tappable (min 44x44px)
Test in tablet view (768x1024 - iPad)
Verify all content is accessible without horizontal scrolling
scenarios.expectedResult: Home page is fully responsive, all elements adapt appropriately to mobile and tablet viewports, content remains readable and interactive

scenarios.title: Verify Free Plan displays correct limitations
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/pricing
Locate the Free plan section
Verify the monthly video limit is displayed as 3 videos/month
Verify the maximum video duration is displayed as 5 minutes
Verify all 25 tools are listed or indicated as available
scenarios.expectedResult: Free plan correctly displays 3 videos/month limit, 5 minutes maximum duration, and access to 25 AI tools

scenarios.title: Verify Pro Plan displays correct features and pricing
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/pricing
Locate the Pro plan section
Verify the price is displayed as $5/month
Verify unlimited videos feature is displayed
Verify all 25 tools are listed or indicated as available
Check for any additional Pro-only features
scenarios.expectedResult: Pro plan correctly displays $5/month pricing, unlimited videos, and access to all 25 AI tools

scenarios.title: Verify Free plan signup or selection process
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/pricing
Locate the Free plan Call-to-Action button
Click on the Free plan signup/selection button
Verify redirection to appropriate signup or dashboard page
Verify Free plan is selected or indicated in user account
scenarios.expectedResult: User can successfully select or signup for Free plan and is redirected to appropriate page with Free plan activated

scenarios.title: Verify Pro plan upgrade flow initiation
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/pricing
Locate the Pro plan Call-to-Action button
Click on the Pro plan upgrade/purchase button
Verify redirection to payment or checkout page
Verify Pro plan details and $5/month price are displayed on checkout
scenarios.expectedResult: User is redirected to payment/checkout page with correct Pro plan pricing of $5/month displayed

scenarios.title: Verify pricing comparison between Free and Pro plans
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/pricing
Locate plan comparison section or table
Compare video limits: Free (3/month) vs Pro (unlimited)
Compare video duration: Free (5 min max) vs Pro
Verify both plans show access to 25 AI tools
Check for visual differentiation highlighting Pro advantages
scenarios.expectedResult: Clear visual comparison shows Free plan with 3 videos/month and 5 min limit versus Pro plan with unlimited videos, both offering 25 tools

scenarios.title: Verify pricing page behavior with invalid currency or locale
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/pricing
Check current currency display for Pro plan ($5/month)
If currency selector exists, attempt to change to different currencies
Verify price converts correctly or remains in USD
Test with different browser locales if applicable
Verify page doesn't break with unsupported currency/locale
scenarios.expectedResult: Pricing page handles currency display gracefully, either converting correctly or maintaining USD pricing without errors

scenarios.title: Successful login with valid credentials
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/login
Enter valid registered email address
Enter correct password
Click 'Login' button
scenarios.expectedResult: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the dashboard with access to 25 AI video tools

scenarios.title: Login failure with invalid credentials
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/login
Enter valid email format but unregistered email
Enter any password
Click 'Login' button
scenarios.expectedResult: Error message is displayed indicating invalid credentials, user remains on login page

scenarios.title: Login with empty required fields
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/login
Leave email field empty
Leave password field empty
Click 'Login' button
scenarios.expectedResult: Validation errors are displayed for both empty fields, login is prevented

scenarios.title: Login with special characters in email field
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/login
Enter email with special characters: test+user@email.com
Enter valid password
Click 'Login' button
scenarios.expectedResult: System accepts valid email format with special characters and processes login attempt correctly

scenarios.title: Free plan user login and verify video limits
steps: Login with valid free plan user credentials
Navigate to dashboard after successful login
Check available video creation quota
Verify video duration limit display
scenarios.expectedResult: Free plan user can login successfully and dashboard displays 3 videos/month limit with max 5 minutes duration restriction

scenarios.title: Session persistence after login
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/login
Enter valid credentials and login successfully
Close the browser completely
Reopen browser and navigate to https://snipforge.video
scenarios.expectedResult: User session is maintained and user remains logged in, or is redirected to login page if session expired (based on remember me setting)

scenarios.title: Successful user registration with valid email and password
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/register
Enter a valid email address in the email field
Enter a strong password meeting requirements in the password field
Confirm password in the confirm password field
Click on the 'Register' or 'Sign Up' button
scenarios.expectedResult: User account is created successfully, user is redirected to dashboard or onboarding page, and free plan (3 videos/month, max 5 minutes) is automatically assigned

scenarios.title: Registration fails with already registered email
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/register
Enter an email address that is already registered in the system
Enter a valid password in the password field
Confirm password in the confirm password field
Click on the 'Register' or 'Sign Up' button
scenarios.expectedResult: Registration fails with an error message indicating the email is already registered, suggesting to login or use a different email

scenarios.title: Registration validation for invalid email formats
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/register
Enter invalid email formats (e.g., 'test@', 'test.com', '@domain.com', 'test @domain.com')
Enter a valid password in the password field
Attempt to submit the registration form
scenarios.expectedResult: Registration is blocked with appropriate validation error messages for invalid email format before form submission

scenarios.title: Password strength validation during registration
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/register
Enter a valid email address
Enter a weak password (e.g., '123', 'pass', short password)
Attempt to submit the registration form
scenarios.expectedResult: Registration is blocked with error message indicating password requirements (minimum length, complexity requirements if any), preventing weak password usage

scenarios.title: Password mismatch validation between password and confirm password fields
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/register
Enter a valid email address
Enter a valid password in the password field
Enter a different password in the confirm password field
Click on the 'Register' or 'Sign Up' button
scenarios.expectedResult: Registration is blocked with an error message indicating passwords do not match, prompting user to re-enter matching passwords

scenarios.title: Registration with empty required fields
steps: Navigate to https://snipforge.video/register
Leave all required fields (email, password) empty
Click on the 'Register' or 'Sign Up' button
Alternatively test with only one field filled at a time
scenarios.expectedResult: Registration is prevented with validation error messages indicating which required fields are missing, no account creation occurs
